aiCommentCN: 价格跌得快，心跳得更快。
aiCommentEN: Market drops fast, heart beats faster.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会继续下跌。
【关键位置】
76,000 美元是关键支撑位，破位后将继续下跌。
【短线策略】
做空为主，注意76,000 美元支撑位。
【风险提醒】
风险较高，建议控制仓位
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may continue to fall in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
$76,000 is the key support level, a break below will lead to further decline.
[Outlook]
Short selling is the main strategy, pay attention to the $76,000 support level.
[Reminder]
High risk, it is recommended to control the position
